response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and some embedded work, but the role demands a C++ specialist with deep STL, multi-threading, message-broker, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments, and there is no evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or SDL/IEC 62443 practice. Primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with the core requirement.
strengths: 15+ years of senior engineering experience with architecture and mentoring
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling background
Some low-latency, high-throughput service experience (Sociomantic micro-services)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL work; last C++ role ended ~2015
No demonstrated MQTT, industrial protocol, or IEC 62443/SDL experience
No Azure, IoT industrial automation, or message-broker architecture evidence
